use std::borrow::Cow;

fn normalize_name(name: Cow<str>) -> Cow<str> {
    match name {
        Cow::Borrowed(s) => Cow::Owned(s.trim().to_lowercase()),
        Cow::Owned(mut s) => {
            s = s.trim().to_lowercase().into();
            Cow::Owned(s)
        }
    }
}

fn process_label(label: Cow<str>) -> Cow<str> {
    if label.starts_with("temp_") {
        label
    } else {
        Cow::Owned(format!("temp_{label}"))
    }
}

fn format_path(base: Cow<str>, file: &str) -> String {
    format!("{base}/{file}")
}
